history.notes: Stricter scoring R4. Fixed: broken bar chart, empty space, arrow nav, connection lines, sparse title, missing cons, chart tooltips, theme toggles
R5: Added SVG connection lines to architecture, era markers + decade nav to timeline, scroll-reveal animations, hover effects. Chart.js theme toggle still partially broken on comparison.

R6 eval: Stricter scoring exposed a11y gaps (all files scored 5). Rebuilt all 6 files: added skip-links, aria-labels, landmark roles, focus indicators, SVG icons replacing emojis, Chart.js destroy/rebuild on theme toggle, mobile breakpoints, scroll-reveal fix (visible by default). Updated SKILL.md with a11y section.

R7: 0 console errors. Responsive clamp() padding on slide decks, filter toolbar on comparison chart, animated connection lines + hover dimming on architecture, prefers-color-scheme detection on all 6 files. Best: ai-timeline 8.50. All scores ≥7.

R8: 0 console errors. Enhanced progress bars (4px + glow), added floating gradient orbs to slide deck backgrounds, confirmed count-up animations + hover states already present. Slide decks still weakest at 7.88. Need bigger changes to push past 9.0.

R9 RESEARCH ROUND: Researched CSS scroll-driven animations, @starting-style, container queries, :has(), color-mix(). Rebuilt all 6 files with: CSS prefers-color-scheme media query, enhanced entrance animations, better responsive breakpoints, Chart.js with hover tooltips, improved a11y. Reset loopsSinceResearch.

R10: 0 console errors on all 6 files. Added floating orbs + CSS title animations + divider lines to both slide decks. Added aria-live regions for slide transitions. Fixed donut legend truncation on SaaS dashboard. Slide decks still weakest (7.50) — need more content-slide polish to push past 8. Top files: ai-timeline 8.38, system-architecture 8.38.

R11: Stricter scoring. 0 console errors. Fixed: slide deck title slides (added SVG icons, grid pattern overlay, rotating orbital rings — replacing tiny diamond/emoji), tightened timeline spacing 40%, gradient fills on charts, faster connection line animation on architecture, fixed SVG path error in pitch deck. Slide decks improved but still weakest (7.44). Next: need content-slide overhaul — inner slides are too plain.

R12: 0 console errors. MAJOR fix: slide deck content slides now have gradient backgrounds, dot grid patterns, card/pill list items with distinct SVG icons, staggered entrance animations. Added visible sun/moon theme toggles to ai-timeline and system-architecture. Enhanced scroll-reveal animations (30px translateY + stagger delays). Slide decks improved from 7.0/7.19 → need re-eval. SaaS dashboard best at 8.19.

R13: Much stricter evaluator (benchmarking against Apple/Stripe/NYT/Vercel). 0 console errors all files. Rebuilt all 6: added theme toggles to all files, slide transitions (CSS translateX), card hover effects, system-architecture major overhaul (gradient header, animated connections, expandable nodes), chart interactivity improvements. SaaS dashboard still top (6.56). Next: loopsSinceResearch=4, approaching research trigger.

R14: Fairer evaluator (actually interacted with files). 0 console errors. Added: card hover microinteractions (translateY + shadow), :focus-visible with border-radius, ARIA roles/labels to ai-timeline/comparison/system-architecture, enriched sparse slide 3 on both decks with SVG icons. Updated SKILL.md with hover patterns, focus-visible standard, a11y checklist. Top: saas-dashboard + startup-pitch-deck (8.00). Weakest: ai-timeline + comparison (7.25). loopsSinceResearch=5 → next round should be RESEARCH.

R15: Major jump +1.02. 0 console errors. Scores: ai-timeline 8.0, comparison 8.5, saas-dashboard 8.9, slide-deck-demo 8.8, startup-pitch-deck 8.9, system-architecture 8.6. FIXED: ai-timeline light theme completely broken. Top: saas-dashboard & startup-pitch-deck (8.9).

R16: Stricter evaluator dropped scores. 0 console errors. Scores: ai-timeline 7.63, comparison 8.00, saas-dashboard 8.00, slide-deck-demo 7.75, startup-pitch-deck 7.88, system-architecture 8.00. FIXED: slide deck light themes (pastel gradients), animation scale transforms, card hover border-color transitions. Theme Support was 6→expected 8+ post-fix. loopsSinceResearch=7 → research due next round.

R17 RESEARCH ROUND: Researched interpolate-size, CSS anchor positioning, ::details-content, styleable details. Core fix: slide deck theme-aware gradients (dark=deep saturated, light=soft pastel). Added interpolate-size: allow-keywords to all files. Enhanced chart hover micro-interactions, SVG icon hover effects, staggered scroll-reveal animations. Updated SKILL.md with Theme-Aware Slide Gradients section. 0 console errors all 6 files. Reset loopsSinceResearch.

R18: 0 console errors. Scores: ai-timeline 8.0, comparison 8.0, saas-dashboard 8.3, slide-deck-demo 8.4, startup-pitch-deck 8.1, system-architecture 8.1. Fixed: chart interactivity (tooltips, hover highlights), a11y (ARIA labels, focus-visible), system-architecture mobile responsiveness, micro-interactions across all files. Weakest dimension: comparison interactivity (6→fixed). Top: slide-deck-demo 8.4.

R19: Stricter evaluator. 0 console errors. Scores: ai-timeline 7.6, comparison 7.4, saas-dashboard 7.5, slide-deck-demo 8.0, startup-pitch-deck 8.1, system-architecture 7.5. Weakest dimension: responsiveness (6-7 across all). FIXED: mobile breakpoints (768px/480px) for all 6 files, saas-dashboard a11y (+15 ARIA attrs), system-architecture broken HTML nodes, gradient hero text on ai-timeline. Top: startup-pitch-deck 8.1.

R20: 0 console errors. Scores: ai-timeline 6.8, comparison 6.8, saas-dashboard 7.3, slide-deck-demo 7.6, startup-pitch-deck 7.6, system-architecture 7.0. Weakest dimensions: animation (6.3 avg), interactivity (6.7 avg). FIXED: dedicated floating theme toggles on ai-timeline/comparison/system-architecture (consistency), scroll-reveal data-reveal attrs on stat grids, chartGrow CSS animation on charts, visually-hidden chart data summaries for a11y. All 6 validated: 0 errors, both themes working.

R21: 0 console errors all 6 files. Scores: ai-timeline 7.25, comparison 7.00, saas-dashboard 7.25, slide-deck-demo 7.25, startup-pitch-deck 7.25, system-architecture 7.25. FIXED: sticky section nav on ai-timeline (era-based) and system-architecture (layer-based), light theme card shadows on all 6 files, staggered card entrance animations on ai-timeline and comparison, slide deck title slides enlarged (5.5-6rem headings + SVG dividers + accent pills), chart tooltip verification. loopsSinceResearch=4.

R22: 0 console errors all 6 files. Scores: ai-timeline 7.88, comparison 7.50, saas-dashboard 7.63, slide-deck-demo 7.50, startup-pitch-deck 7.63, system-architecture 7.75. FIXED: staggered data-reveal with --i delays on all scroll files, chart-tooltip CSS + elements on comparison/saas, slide transition CSS on both decks, enhanced focus-visible with box-shadow on all 6, filled sparse slides (48px icons, sub-labels, metric pills). loopsSinceResearch=5 → research due next round.
